retry_reason: The decrement always succeeds; calling it when refcount is already zero would be a double-put bug, not recoverable by retry.
contract_summary: This is the release (put) function for a c4iw_qp reference-counted object. It decrements qp_refcnt via refcount_dec_and_test, and when the refcount reaches zero it signals the qp_rel_comp completion, typically indicating the object can be safely deallocated. The caller must have previously obtained a valid reference (e.g., via c4iw_qp_add_ref) and must not access the qp after this call completes, as the object may be freed asynchronously.

judge.reason: The sole purpose is to decrement the qp_refcnt and complete on zero — pure refcount put wrapper with no other business logic.
